setupWizard.title: Setup Wizard
setupWizard.step1Subtitle: Complete your initial company profile to optimize your industrial management workflow.
setupWizard.securityNote: Data is protected by 256-bit industrial-grade encryption
setupWizard.step2Subtitle: Define your material flow nodes. We recommend dividing by physical areas.
setupWizard.rawRequired: Raw material warehouse name is required
setupWizard.finishedRequired: Finished goods warehouse name is required
setupWizard.step3Subtitle: Company information, warehouses, and default warehouse mappings have been saved. Your system is ready for business.
setupWizard.addSupplierDesc: Build your supply chain foundation by adding partner information.
setupWizard.newPurchaseOrderDesc: Start your first material purchase to complete the inventory flow.
setupWizard.importInventoryDesc: Quickly sync existing inventory data for a seamless transition.
setupWizard.saveFailed: Save failed, please try again later
setupWizard.warehouseCreateFailed: Warehouse creation failed, please try again later
